## Summary

- What changed:
- Why it changed:

## Validation

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make check-hygiene`
- [ ] `make build-package`
- [ ] Relevant CLI flow exercised locally

## Data Handling

- [ ] No raw workbook or reference blobs were committed accidentally
- [ ] Generated `reports/`, `strategy/`, Bronze, Silver, and Gold artifacts remain ignored
- [ ] Workbook assumptions are still treated as hypotheses until Gold reconciliation

## Docs

- [ ] README updated if CLI or workflow changed
- [ ] Data dictionary updated if dataset fields changed
- [ ] Analyst runbook updated if output interpretation changed
